Package org.mybatis.generator.config

  • Method Details

    • withConfigurationType

      public T withConfigurationType(@Nullable String configurationType)
      Sets the value of the type specified in the configuration. If the special value DEFAULT is specified, then the value will be ignored.
      Parameters:
      configurationType - the value of the type specified in the configuration. For some subclasses, if the special value DEFAULT is specified, then the value will be ignored.
